final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color + secondary color + typography specification sheet for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "东方哲学" aesthetic with "秋日诗意" mood — references in the spirit of 新中式 design movement, 宋画 ink-and-color tradition, 故宫文创 contemporary palette work; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand guideline sheet layout with three clear sections: primary color / secondary color / typography specifications
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" prominently
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include autumn-inspired tones drawn from 桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀 — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve brand philosophy of 东方哲学 and 染的工艺美学; must show primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications clearly
Avoid: must avoid Western-centric color palettes that clash with 新中式 aesthetic
